message: Node started: Analyze the provided FTIR peaks (1645, 1652, 1618, and 1680 cm^-1) in the context of protein gelation. Determine the secondary structure changes (e.g., alpha-helix, beta-sheet, random coil, turns) indicated by these specific wavenumbers. Evaluate how heating and concentration affect these peaks to deduce the gelation mechanism. Finally, select the correct answer from the provided options (which will be provided in the next step if not already present, though the prompt implies they are part of the task context). Return the answer in the format: FINAL_ANSWER: <letter> and JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>.
